data.title: Kraft Heinz to Invest $250 Million in Montreal’s Mont Royal Factory to Strengthen Canadian Manufacturing Capacity
data.description: Kraft Heinz Canada has unveiled a $250 million plan to revamp its Mont Royal factory in Montreal, showcasing a firm dedication to Canadian manufacturing and the local production of its renowned brands. The substantial investment will primarily focus on enhancing and modernizing essential plant systems at the Mont Royal facility, a site that currently accommodates a workforce of more than 1,000 individuals. The allocated funds aim to drive improvements in efficiency, sustainability, and innovation within the factory.

data.title: FallTech® Introduces FT-R® SRL-R Series for Faster Confined Space Rescue
data.description: In Los Angeles on March 20, 2026, FallTech unveiled two innovative self-retracting lifelines: the FT-R® SRL-R and FT-R® Arc Flash SRL-R. These lightweight lifelines not only provide fall arrest capabilities but also offer built-in retrieval functionality. This new generation aims to enhance safety measures, catering to the needs of workers exposed to fall risks. The introduction signifies FallTech's commitment to advancing safety in the workplace.

data.title: Fractal EMS Receives ISO/IEC 9001 and 27001 Certifications
data.description: Fractal EMS Inc., a renowned company based in Austin, Texas, made a significant announcement on March 20, 2026. The company, specializing in energy management systems and SCADA for various projects including battery storage, solar, hybrid, and data centers, has recently attained certification for ISO 9001:2015 and ISO/IEC 27001:2022. This accomplishment underscores Fractal's commitment to maintaining high standards in quality management and information security. The certifications serve as a testament to the company's dedication to excellence and adherence to industry best practices.

data.title: BRP Unveils the Winners of its 6th International Design Challenge
data.description: BRP Inc. has proudly revealed the victors of its 6th International Design Challenge held in Rovaniemi, Finland. The competition united around 70 students from 8 universities for this year's event. The company's shares (TSX: DOO) (NASDAQ: DOO) have reflected this success, with positive responses from the participants and observers alike.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig Wins Wrongful Seizure of Imported Goods Cases for Castro Business Enterprises Valued at $3.148M
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in the U.S. District Court for the District of Puerto Rico, a team from Greenberg Traurig, LLP, headed by Litigation Practice Shareholder Francisco O. Sánchez and Associate Carlos J. Andréu-Collazo, secured a victory for importer Castro Business Enterprises.

data.title: 11 Greenberg Traurig Attorneys Recognized in Colorado Super Lawyers 2026 Edition
data.description: In Denver on March 20, 2026, the 2026 editions of Colorado Super Lawyers and Super Lawyers "Rising Stars" acknowledged 11 attorneys from the Denver office of the global law firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP.
